validator.note: Official reference validator (Python, Apache-2.0). Pinned as the version anchor only; khai mirrors its ruleset in pure Node and does NOT run it. The npm package named 'skills-ref' is an unrelated third-party package, do not use it.

notes: Upstream publishes no semver tags or releases; the spec is a rolling main. We pin the validator's published version (clean semver) and the spec file's content hash. The on-touch drift check compares these against the real source. Re-pinning is a deliberate human act after reconciling the mirrored rules in lib/guard.mjs.
